name: Consumer Pocket Monitor
approach: A compact, user-friendly handheld using proven off-the-shelf sensors and an ESP32 SoC for integrated Wi‑Fi + Bluetooth. Focus on ease-of-use, fast time-to-market, and reliable indoor air readings for consumers and light commercial users.
highlights: Sensors: Sensirion SPS30 (PM2.5 optical), Sensirion SCD41 (NDIR CO2), Sensirion SHT40 (temp/humidity) — high accuracy, small footprint.
Connectivity: ESP32 provides dual-mode Wi‑Fi (2.4 GHz) + Bluetooth Low Energy for direct sync to cloud or smartphone app.

Power: 4000 mAh Li‑ion rechargeable battery with USB‑C charging and integrated fuel gauge; typical power budget sized for 8–12 hours continuous use at 1 sample/sec; user-selectable sample rates to extend runtime (e.g., 1/min for multi-day use).
UI: 2.4" color capacitive display with simple icons, one-button operation, vibration alert for thresholds, and status LEDs for connectivity/battery.
Data handling: Internal circular buffer (16k samples) and automatic sync when connected; CSV export via app or Wi‑Fi; OTA firmware updates.
Form factor & ergonomics: 160×60×28 mm, ~200 g, soft-grip housing, single-handed operation.
Pros/cons: Fast development and lower BOM cost; sensor accuracy good for consumer/prosumer use but not calibrated to lab standards out of the box.

name: Modular Pro Field Monitor
approach: A rugged, modular handheld aimed at professionals (building inspectors, industrial hygienists). Core platform supports swappable sensor modules (high-accuracy particulate and CO2), enterprise-grade wireless, and advanced data logging/calibration features.
highlights: Sensors: Modular bay supports Alphasense OPC-N3 (PM2.5) module and Senseair Sunrise or a high-precision NDIR CO2 module; integrated Bosch BME688 or Sensirion SHT4x for temp/humidity and IAQ inference.
Modularity: Hot-swappable sensor cartridges for field replacement and lab calibration; modular firmware automatically recognizes sensors and loads calibrations.

Connectivity: Dual-radio architecture — nRF52840 for Bluetooth 5.2 + ESP32 or cellular/NB IoT option for Wi‑Fi/cellular. Enterprise features: TLS, certificate-based auth, and local MQTT endpoint support.

Power: 5200 mAh smart Li‑ion battery with swappable option and fast USB‑C PD charging; power management supports active logging for 8+ hours even under continuous sampling and logging to onboard microSD.
Ruggedness & UI: IP54 housing, glove-friendly buttons, daylight-readable 3.5" LCD, and optional external probe for remote sampling.
Data & calibration: On-device advanced logging (timestamped), local storage (up to 1 year at standard sample rates), PC calibration tool, and field calibration routines for CO2 and PM sensors.
Pros/cons: High accuracy, field-serviceable, and enterprise-grade features increase cost and weight but meet stringent measurement requirements.

name: Ultra-Low-Power Patrol Clip
approach: A lightweight, low-power wearable/clip-on monitor for first-responders and mobile workers. Prioritizes weight and battery life through duty-cycled sensing, BLE-first sync to smartphone, and optional Wi‑Fi docking for bulk uploads.
highlights: Sensors: Plantower PMS5003-mini or Sensirion SPS30 for PM2.5 (optimized sampling bursts), Sensirion SCD41 low-power NDIR for CO2, combined temp/humidity sensor (SHTC3) for low power draw.

Power strategy: Aggressive duty cycling (sensor wake/sampling bursts every 30–60 seconds), deep-sleep MCU (Nordic nRF52840 or low-power STM32 + BLE), and e-ink or minimal LED indicators. A 2500–3500 mAh cell targeted for 8–24 hours depending on sampling profile.
Connectivity: BLE-first sync to smartphone app (real-time live view) with optional Wi‑Fi gateway/dock that bulk-uploads stored data when docked; OTA via phone or docking station.
Form factor: Lightweight clip (80–100 g), ruggedized polymer housing, single-button and multi-color LED for air-quality state, designed to be unobtrusive on clothing or gear.
Data handling: Local ring buffer with prioritized event logging (high PM/CO2 events saved at higher resolution), configurable sampling profiles via app.

User scenarios & trade-offs: Ideal for patrols and mobile workers needing long runtimes and low weight. Sacrifices continuous high-frequency sampling accuracy for extended battery life and portability.
Extras: Optional solar trickle-charge panel accessory for extended missions; magnetic docking station for Wi‑Fi sync and charging.
